summary: The diff shows that all watermark-related code has been successfully removed from the specified frontend components and CSS file. All 8 requirements appear to be implemented. The components (SiteHeader, ServicesPage, QualitySafetyPolicyPage, MajorClientsPage, MajorProjectsPage, GalleryPage, EnquiryPage) no longer contain watermark-related CSS classes or styling, and the index.css file has been cleaned of watermark utility classes. The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms the removal of watermark backgrounds across all affected pages.
